title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A philosophical novel about a shepherd who dreams of finding treasure and learns to listen to his heart and follow his personal legend.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: A practical guide that explains how small daily habits compound into remarkable personal and professional growth over time.

author: George Orwell
description: A dystopian novel depicting a totalitarian society under constant surveillance where independent thought is suppressed.

title: Deep Work
author: Cal Newport
description: A book that argues the ability to focus deeply without distraction is a critical skill for success in the modern knowledge economy.

title: Man's Search for Meaning
author: Viktor E. Frankl
description: A memoir and psychological exploration of finding meaning in life through suffering, responsibility, and purpose.

title: The Psychology of Money
author: Morgan Housel
description: An exploration of how human behavior and emotions influence financial decisions more than logic or technical knowledge.

title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: A sweeping history of humanity examining how biology, culture, and ideas shaped modern society.

title: Rich Dad Poor Dad
author: Robert T. Kiyosaki
description: A personal finance book that contrasts two perspectives on money, assets, and financial independence.

title: The Power of Now
author: Eckhart Tolle
description: A spiritual guide emphasizing mindfulness, presence, and living fully in the present moment.

title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
author: Daniel Kahneman
description: A deep dive into human thinking, explaining the two systems that drive decision-making: intuitive and deliberate thought.
